[[BLOCK:slide14_shape1]]
Also known as Regularized Regression (正则化回归 (Regularized Regression)): Aims to reduce variance and improve the generalization ability of the model, thereby avoiding overfitting.  
Also referred to as Penalized Regression (惩罚回归 (Penalized Regression)): Applies penalties to overly complex or exaggeratedly fitted models → Adheres to the principle of simplicity (KISS, Keep it simple, stupid)!
